briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to program eFuses with user provided data.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the client instance
Address of the data structure where the eFUSE data to be programmed is stored

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS If the eFUSE programming is successful
XST_INVALID_PARAM If there is a input validation failure
XST_FAILURE If there is a failure
Validate input parameters. Return XST_INVALID_PARAM if input parameters are invalid.
Fill Payload
Send request using generic API

memberdef.argsstring: (const XNvm_ClientInstance *InstancePtr, const u64 IvAddr, const u32 EnvDisFlag)
memberdef.name: XNvm_EfuseWriteIVs

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to program IV eFuses with user provided data.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the client instance
Address of the data structure where the eFUSE data to be programmed is stored
Flag that tells weather to enable/disable Environmental monitoring in XilNvm

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS If the programming is successful
XST_INVALID_PARAM If there is a input validation failure
XST_FAILURE If there is a failure
Validate input parameters. Return XST_INVALID_PARAM if input parameters are invalid.
Link Shared memory for IPI usage. If shared memory is not assigned return XST_FAILURE.
Zeroize the shared memory.
Fill Payload
Send request using generic API

memberdef.argsstring: (const XNvm_ClientInstance *InstancePtr, const XNvm_PpkType PpkRevoke, const u32 EnvDisFlag)
memberdef.name: XNvm_EfuseRevokePpk

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to program PPK_INVLD eFuse requested by the user.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the client instance
Type of PPK_INVLD to be revoked
Flag that tells whether to enable/disable Environmental monitoring in XilNvm

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS If the programming is successful
XST_INVALID_PARAM If there is a input validation failure
XST_FAILURE If there is a failure
Validate input parameters. Return XST_INVALID_PARAM if input parameters are invalid.
Link shared memory for IPI usage. If shared memory is not assigned return XST_FAILURE.
Zeroize the shared memory.
Fill Payload
Send request using generic API

memberdef.argsstring: (const XNvm_ClientInstance *InstancePtr, const u32 RevokeId, const u32 EnvDisFlag)
memberdef.name: XNvm_EfuseWriteRevocationId

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to program revoke id eFuses requested by the user.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the client instance
RevokeId number to be revoked
Flag that tells whether to enable/disable Environmental monitoring in XilNvm

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS If the programming is successful
XST_INVALID_PARAM If there is a input validation failure
XST_FAILURE If there is a failure
Validate input parameters. Return XST_INVALID_PARAM if input parameters are invalid.
Link shared memory for IPI usage. If shared memory is not assigned return XST_FAILURE.
Zeroize the shared memory.
Fill Payload
Send request using generic API

memberdef.argsstring: (const XNvm_ClientInstance *InstancePtr, const u64 UserFuseAddr, const u32 EnvDisFlag)
memberdef.name: XNvm_EfuseWriteUserFuses

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to program User eFuses requested by the user.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the client instance
Address of the XNvm_EfuseUserData structure where the user provided data to be programmed
Flag that tells whether to enable/disable Environmental monitoring in XilNvm

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS If the programming is successful
XST_INVALID_PARAM If there is a input validation failure
XST_FAILURE If there is a failure
Validate input parameters. Return XST_INVALID_PARAM if input parameters are invalid.
Link shared memory for IPI usage. If shared memory is not assigned return XST_FAILURE.
Zeroize the shared memory.
Fill Payload
Send request using generic API

memberdef.argsstring: (const XNvm_ClientInstance *InstancePtr, const u64 IvAddr, const XNvm_IvType IvType)
memberdef.name: XNvm_EfuseReadIv

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to read IV eFuses requested by the user.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the client instance
Address of the output buffer to store the IV eFuse data
Type of the IV to read out

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS If the read is successful
XST_INVALID_PARAM If there is a input validation failure
XST_FAILURE If there is a failure
Validate input parameters. Return XST_INVALID_PARAM if input parameters are invalid.
Fill Payload
Send request using generic API

memberdef.argsstring: (const XNvm_ClientInstance *InstancePtr, const u64 RevokeIdAddr, const XNvm_RevocationId RevokeIdNum)
memberdef.name: XNvm_EfuseReadRevocationId

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to read Revocation ID eFuses requested by the user.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the client instance
Address of the output buffer to store the Revocation ID eFuse data
Revocation ID to be read out

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS If the read is successful
XST_INVALID_PARAM If there is a input validation failure
XST_FAILURE If there is a failure
Validate input parameters. Return XST_INVALID_PARAM if input parameters are invalid.
Fill Payload
Send request using generic API

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to read User eFuses requested by the user.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the client instance
Address of the output buffer to store the User eFuse data

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS If the read is successful
XST_INVALID_PARAM If there is a input validation failure
XST_FAILURE If there is a failure
Validate input parameters. Return XST_INVALID_PARAM if input parameters are invalid.
Fill Payload
Send request using generic API

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to read MiscCtrlBits requested by the user.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the client instance

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS If the read is successful

XST_FAILURE If there is a failure
Validate input parameters. Return XST_INVALID_PARAM if input parameters are invalid.
Fill Payload
Send request using generic API

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to read SecCtrlBits requested by the user.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the client instance

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS If the read is successful
XST_INVALID_PARAM If there is a input validation failure
XST_FAILURE If there is a failure
Validate input parameters. Return XST_INVALID_PARAM if input parameters are invalid.
Fill Payload
Send request using generic API

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to read SecMisc1Bits requested by the user.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the client instance
Address of the output buffer to store the SecMisc1Bits eFuses data

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS If the read is successful
XST_INVALID_PARAM If there is a input validation failure
XST_FAILURE If there is a failure
Validate input parameters. Return XST_INVALID_PARAM if input parameters are invalid.
Fill Payload
Send request using generic API

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to read BootEnvCtrlBits requested by the user.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the client instance
Address of the output buffer to store the BootEnvCtrlBits eFuses data

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS If the read is successful
XST_INVALID_PARAM If there is a input validation failure
XST_FAILURE If there is a failure
Validate input parameters. Return XST_INVALID_PARAM if input parameters are invalid.
Fill Payload
Send request using generic API

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to read PufSecCtrlBits requested by the user.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the client instance
Address of the output buffer to store the PufSecCtrlBits eFuses data

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS If the read is successful
XST_INVALID_PARAM If there is a input validation failure
XST_FAILURE If there is a failure
Validate input parameters. Return XST_INVALID_PARAM if input parameters are invalid.
Fill IPI Payload
Send request using generic API

memberdef.argsstring: (const XNvm_ClientInstance *InstancePtr, const u64 OffChidIdAddr, const XNvm_OffchipId OffChipIdNum)
memberdef.name: XNvm_EfuseReadOffchipRevokeId

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to read OffChip ID eFuses requested by the user.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the client instance
Address of the output buffer to store the OffChip ID eFuse data
OffChip ID number to be read out

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS If the read is successful
XST_INVALID_PARAM If there is a input validation failure
XST_FAILURE If there is a failure
Validate input parameters. Return XST_INVALID_PARAM if input parameters are invalid.
Fill Payload
Send request using generic API

memberdef.argsstring: (const XNvm_ClientInstance *InstancePtr, const u64 PpkHashAddr, const XNvm_PpkType PpkHashType)
memberdef.name: XNvm_EfuseReadPpkHash

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to read PpkHash requested by the user.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the client instance
Address of the output buffer to store the PpkHashAddr eFuses data
Type of the PpkHash to be read out

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS If the read is successful
XST_INVALID_PARAM If there is a input validation failure
XST_FAILURE If there is a failure
Validate input parameters. Return XST_INVALID_PARAM if input parameters are invalid.
Fill Payload
Send request using generic API

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to read DecEfuseOnly eFuses requested by the user.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the client instance
Address of the output buffer to store the DecEfuseOnly eFuses data

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS If the read is successful
XST_INVALID_PARAM If there is a input validation failure
XST_FAILURE If there is a failure
Validate input parameters. Return XST_INVALID_PARAM if input parameters are invalid.
Fill Payload
Send request using generic API

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to read DNA eFuses requested by the user.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the client instance
Address of the output buffer to store the DNA eFuses data

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS If the read is successful
XST_INVALID_PARAM If there is a input validation failure
XST_FAILURE If there is a failure
Validate input parameters. Return XST_INVALID_PARAM if input parameters are invalid.
Fill Payload
Send request using generic API

memberdef.argsstring: (const XNvm_ClientInstance *InstancePtr, const u32 AesKeyCrc, const XNvm_AesKeyType AesKeyType)
memberdef.name: XNvm_EfuseAesKeyCrcCheck

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to check given CRC is matched with calculated CRC.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the client instance
CRC value of the AES key which needs to be checked

Type of AES key Supported key types:
XNVM_EFUSE_AES_KEY
XNVM_EFUSE_USER_KEY0
XNVM_EFUSE_USER_KEY1

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS If the CRC matches
XST_INVALID_PARAM If there is a input validation failure
XNVM_EFUSE_ERR_CRC_VERIFICATION If there is a CRC verification failure
Validate input parameters. Return XST_INVALID_PARAM if input parameters are invalid.
Fill Payload
Send request using generic API
Validate input parameters. Return XST_INVALID_PARAM if input parameters are invalid.
Fill IPI Payload
Send check AES key CRC CDO to PLM to check the given CRC. Return XST_FAILURE if IPI request processing fails in PLM.

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to program Puf helper data requested by the user.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the client instance
Address of the XNvm_EfusePufHdAddr structure where the user provided helper data to be programmed

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS If the programming is successful
XST_INVALID_PARAM If there is a input validation failure
XST_FAILURE If there is a failure
Validate input parameters. Return XST_INVALID_PARAM if input parameters are invalid.
Fill Payload
Send request using generic API

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to read Puf helper data requested by the user.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the client instance
Address of the output buffer to store the Puf helper data

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS If the read is successful
XST_INVALID_PARAM If there is a input validation failure
XST_FAILURE If there is a failure
Validate input parameters. Return XST_INVALID_PARAM if input parameters are invalid.
Fill Payload
Send request using generic API

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to program eFuses with user provided data.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the client instance
Address of the data structure where the eFUSE data to be programmed is stored

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If the eFUSE programming is successful
XST_INVALID_PARAM - On invalid input parameters
Validate input parameters. Return XST_INVALID_PARAM, If input parameters are invalid.

Validate AES,UsrKey,PPK0,PPK1,PPK2,IVs write request. If validation is success, Send XNvm_EfuseWrite CDO over IPI to the PLM. Wait for IPI response from PLM with a default timeout of 300 seconds. If the timeout exceeds then return the error else return status of the IPI response.

Validate PPK hash and sends an IPI request to the PLM by using the XNVM_API_ID_EFUSE_WRITE_PPK_HASH CDO command. Wait for IPI response from PLM with a default timeout of 300 seconds. If the timeout exceeds then error is returned otherwise it returns the status of the IPI response

Validates IV and sends an IPI request to the PLM by using the XNVM_API_ID_EFUSE_WRITE_IV CDO command. Wait for IPI response from PLM with a default timeout of 300 seconds. If the timeout exceeds then error is returned otherwise it returns the status of the IPI response
Fill IPI Payload

memberdef.argsstring: (XNvm_ClientInstance *InstancePtr, const u64 IvAddr, const u32 EnvDisFlag)
memberdef.name: XNvm_EfuseWriteIVs

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to program IV as requested by the user.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the client instance
Address of the IV to be programmed
Environmental monitoring flag set by the user. when set to true it will not check for voltage and temperature limits.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If the programming is successful
XST_INVALID_PARAM - On invalid input parameters
XST_FAILURE - On shared memory allocation or validation failure
Validate input parameters. Return XST_INVALID_PARAM, if input parameters are invalid.
Get shared memory allocated by the user using XMailbox_GetSharedMem API, to store data structure in the user memory.
Perform validation on the size of the shared memory, if size is less than the total size return XST_FAILURE.
Fill the EfuseData structure with the IV address, Environmental disable flag.
Send XNvm_EfuseWriteIv CDO over IPI to the PLM. Wait for IPI response from PLM with a default timeout of 300 seconds.
Fill IPI Payload

memberdef.argsstring: (XNvm_ClientInstance *InstancePtr, const u64 UdsAddr, const u32 EnvDisFlag)
memberdef.name: XNvm_EfuseWriteDiceUds

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to program DICE UDS.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the client instance
Address of the UDS to be programmed
Environmental monitoring flag set by the user. when set to true it will not check for voltage and temperature limits.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If the programming is successful
XST_INVALID_PARAM - On invalid input parameters
Perform input parameter validation on InstancePtr. Return XST_INVALID_PARAM If input parameters are invalid
Send an IPI request to the PLM by using the XNVM_API_ID_EFUSE_WRITE_UDS CDO command. Wait for IPI response from PLM with a default timeout of 300 seconds
Fill IPI Payload

memberdef.argsstring: (XNvm_ClientInstance *InstancePtr, u32 DmeKeyType, const u64 DmeKeyAddr, const u32 EnvDisFlag)
memberdef.name: XNvm_WriteDmePrivateKey

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to program encrypted DME private key.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the client instance
Type of DME Key which needs to be programmed
Address of the encrypted DME private key to be programmed
Environmental monitoring flag set by the user. when set to true it will not check for voltage and temperature limits.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If the programming is successful
XST_INVALID_PARAM - On invalid input parameters
Perform input parameter validation on InstancePtr. Return XST_INVALID_PARAM If input parameters are invalid
Send an IPI request to the PLM by using the XNVM_API_ID_EFUSE_WRITE_DME_KEY CDO command. Wait for IPI response from PLM with a default timeout of 300 seconds
Fill IPI Payload

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to program DME mode requested by the user.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the client instance
Value of DME mode to be programmed
Environmental monitoring flag set by the user. When set to true it will not check for voltage and temperature limits.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If the programming is successful
XST_INVALID_PARAM - On invalid input parameters
Perform input parameter validation on InstancePtr. Return XST_INVALID_PARAM If input parameters are invalid.
Send an IPI request to the PLM by using the XNVM_API_ID_EFUSE_WRITE_DME_MODE CDO command. Wait for IPI response from PLM with a default timeout of 300 seconds
Fill IPI Payload

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to read DME Mode eFuses requested by the user.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the client instance
Address of the output buffer to store the DME Mode read from the eFUSE cache

listitem.para:
XST_SUCCESS - If the read is successful
XST_INVALID_PARAM - On invalid input parameters
Validate input parameters. Return XST_INVALID_PARAM, if input parameters are invalid.
Send an IPI request to the PLM by using the XNVM_API_ID_EFUSE_READ_CACHE CDO command.
Wait for IPI response from PLM with a default timeout of 300 seconds.
If the timeout exceeds then error is returned otherwise it returns the status of the IPI response

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to program Secure Control Bits requested by the user.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the client instance
Value of Secure Control Bits to be programmed
Environmental monitoring flag set by the user. When set to true it will not check for voltage and temperature limits.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If the programming is successful
XST_INVALID_PARAM - On invalid input parameters
Perform input parameter validation on InstancePtr. Return XST_INVALID_PARAM If input parameters are invalid.
Send an IPI request to the PLM by using the XNVM_API_ID_EFUSE_WRITE_SEC_CTRL_BITS CDO command. Wait for IPI response from PLM with a default timeout of 300 seconds
Fill IPI Payload

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to program Puf Control Bits requested by the user.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the client instance
Value of Puf Control Bits to be programmed
Environmental monitoring flag set by the user. When set to true it will not check for voltage and temperature limits.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If the programming is successful
XST_INVALID_PARAM - On invalid input parameters
Perform input parameter validation on InstancePtr. Return XST_INVALID_PARAM If input parameters are invalid.
Send an IPI request to the PLM by using the XNVM_API_ID_EFUSE_WRITE_PUF_CTRL_BITS CDO command. Wait for IPI response from PLM with a default timeout of 300 seconds.
Fill IPI Payload

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to program Misc Control Bits requested by the user.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the client instance
Value of Misc Control Bits to be programmed
Environmental monitoring flag set by the user. When set to true it will not check for voltage and temperature limits.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If the programming is successful
XST_INVALID_PARAM - On invalid input parameters
Perform input parameter validation on InstancePtr. Return XST_INVALID_PARAM If input parameters are invalid.
Send an IPI request to the PLM by using the XNVM_API_ID_EFUSE_WRITE_MISC_CTRL_BITS CDO command. Wait for IPI response from PLM with a default timeout of 300 seconds
Fill IPI Payload

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to program BootMode disable efuse bits requested by the user.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the client instance
Value of Boot mode disable Bits to be programmed
Environmental monitoring flag set by the user. When set to true it will not check for voltage and temperature limits.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If the programming is successful
XST_INVALID_PARAM - On invalid input parameters
Perform input parameter validation on InstancePtr. Return XST_INVALID_PARAM If input parameters are invalid.
Send an IPI request to the PLM by using the XNVM_API_ID_EFUSE_WRITE_BOOT_MODE_DISABLE CDO command. Wait for IPI response from PLM with a default timeout of 300 seconds
Fill IPI Payload

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to program Sec Misc 1 Bits requested by the user.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the client instance
Value of Sec Misc 1 Bits to be programmed
Environmental monitoring flag set by the user. When set to true it will not check for voltage and temperature limits.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If the programming is successful
XST_INVALID_PARAM - On invalid input parameters
Perform input parameter validation on InstancePtr. Return XST_INVALID_PARAM If input parameters are invalid.
Send an IPI request to the PLM by using the XNVM_API_ID_EFUSE_WRITE_MISC1_CTRL_BITS CDO command. Wait for IPI response from PLM with a default timeout of 300 seconds
Fill IPI Payload

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to program Boot Env Ctrl Bits requested by the user.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the client instance
Value of BootEnvCtrl Bits to be programmed
Environmental monitoring flag set by the user. When set to true it will not check for voltage and temperature limits.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If the programming is successful
XST_INVALID_PARAM - On invalid input parameters
Perform input parameter validation on InstancePtr. Return XST_INVALID_PARAM If input parameters are invalid.
Send an IPI request to the PLM by using the XNVM_API_ID_EFUSE_WRITE_BOOT_ENV_CTRL_BITS CDO command. Wait for IPI response from PLM with a default timeout of 300 seconds
Fill IPI Payload

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to program ROM Rsvd Bits requested by the user.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the client instance
Value of ROM Rsvd Bits to be programmed
Environmental monitoring flag set by the user. When set to true it will not check for voltage and temperature limits.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If the programming is successful
XST_INVALID_PARAM - On invalid input parameters
Perform input parameter validation on InstancePtr. Return XST_INVALID_PARAM If input parameters are invalid.
Send an IPI request to the PLM by using the XNVM_API_ID_EFUSE_WRITE_ROM_RSVD CDO command. Wait for IPI response from PLM with a default timeout of 300 seconds
Fill IPI Payload

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to program Glitch Cfg Bits requested by the user.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the client instance
Value of Glitch Cfg Bits to be programmed
Environmental monitoring flag set by the user. When set to true it will not check for voltage and temperature limits.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If the programming is successful
XST_INVALID_PARAM - On invalid input parameters
Perform input parameter validation on InstancePtr. Return XST_INVALID_PARAM If input parameters are invalid.
Send an IPI request to the PLM by using the XNVM_API_ID_EFUSE_WRITE_GLITCH_CONFIG CDO command. Wait for IPI response from PLM with a default timeout of 300 seconds
Fill IPI Payload

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to program PLM update bit.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the client instance
Environmental monitoring flag set by the user. When set to true it will not check for voltage and temperature limits.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If the programming is successful
XST_INVALID_PARAM - On invalid input parameters
Perform input parameter validation on InstancePtr. Return XST_INVALID_PARAM If input parameters are invalid.
Send an IPI request to the PLM by using the XNVM_API_ID_EFUSE_WRITE_PLM_UPDATE CDO command. Wait for IPI response from PLM with a default timeout of 300 seconds
Fill IPI Payload

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to program Dec Only eFuses.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the client instance
Environmental monitoring flag set by the user. When set to true it will not check for voltage and temperature limits.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If the programming is successful
XST_INVALID_PARAM - On invalid input parameters
Validate input parameters. Return XST_INVALID_PARAM, If input parameters are invalid.
Send XNvm_EfuseWriteSecCtrl CDO over IPI to the PLM. Wait for IPI response from PLM with a default timeout of 300 seconds.
Fill IPI Payload

memberdef.argsstring: (XNvm_ClientInstance *InstancePtr, const u16 FipsMode, const u16 FipsVersion, const u32 EnvDisFlag)
memberdef.name: XNvm_EfuseWriteFipsInfo

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to program FIPS info eFuses.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the client instance
FIPS mode which needs to be programmed
FIPS version which needs to be programmed
Environmental monitoring flag set by the user. When set to true it will not check for voltage and temperature limits.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If the programming is successful
XST_INVALID_PARAM - On invalid input parameters
Validate input parameters. Return XST_INVALID_PARAM, if input parameters are invalid.
Send XNvm_EfuseWritePufCtrl CDO over IPI request to the PLM. Wait for IPI response from PLM with a default timeout of 300 seconds.
Fill IPI Payload

memberdef.argsstring: (XNvm_ClientInstance *InstancePtr, const u32 RevokeIdNum, const u32 EnvDisFlag)
memberdef.name: XNvm_EfuseWriteRevocationId

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to program Revocation Id eFuses.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the client instance
Revocation ID number which needs to be programmed
Environmental monitoring flag set by the user. When set to true it will not check for voltage and temperature limits.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If the programming is successful
XST_INVALID_PARAM - On invalid input parameters
Validate input parameters. Return XST_INVALID_PARAM, if input parameters are invalid.
Send XNvm_EfuseWriteMiscCtrl CDO over IPI request to the PLM. Wait for IPI response from PLM with a default timeout of 300 seconds.
Fill IPI Payload

memberdef.argsstring: (XNvm_ClientInstance *InstancePtr, const u32 OffChipRevokeIdNum, const u32 EnvDisFlag)
memberdef.name: XNvm_EfuseWriteOffChipRevocationId

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to program off chip Revocation Id eFuses.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the client instance
Off Chip Revocation ID number which needs to be programmed
Environmental monitoring flag set by the user. When set to true it will not check for voltage and temperature limits.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If the programming is successful
XST_INVALID_PARAM - On invalid input parameters
Validate input parameters. Return XST_INVALID_PARAM, if input parameters are invalid.
Send XNvm_EfuseWriteRomRsvd CDO over IPI request to the PLM. Wait for IPI response from PLM with a default timeout of 300 seconds.
Fill IPI Payload

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to program Puf helper data requested by the user.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the client instance
Address of the XNvm_EfusePufHdAddr structure where the user provided helper data to be programmed

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If the programming is successful
XST_INVALID_PARAM - On invalid input parameters
Validate input parameters. Return XST_INVALID_PARAM, if input parameters are invalid.

Send XNvm_EfuseWritePuf CDO over IPI request to the PLM. Wait for IPI response from PLM with a default timeout of 300 seconds. If the timeout exceeds then return error else return status of the IPI response.
Fill IPI Payload

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to read Puf data(Puf helper data, Puf Chash, Puf Aux data and Puf RO Swap) from the eFUSE cache.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the client instance
Address of the XNvm_EfusePufHdAddr structure where the user provided helper data to be programmed

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If the read is successful
XST_INVALID_PARAM - On invalid input parameters
Validate input parameters. Return XST_INVALID_PARAM, if input parameters are invalid.
Read Puf helper data.
Read Puf Chash.
Read Puf Aux data.
Read RO Swap.

Send XNvm_EfuseReadPuf CDO over IPI request to the PLM. Wait for IPI response from PLM with a default timeout of 300 seconds. If the timeout exceeds then return error else return the status of the IPI response.

memberdef.argsstring: (XNvm_ClientInstance *InstancePtr, const u64 IvAddr, const XNvm_IvType IvType)
memberdef.name: XNvm_EfuseReadIv

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to read IV eFuses requested by the user.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the client instance
Address of the output buffer to store the IV eFuse data
Type of the IV to read out

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If the read is successful
XST_INVALID_PARAM - On invalid input parameters
Validate input parameters. Return XST_INVALID_PARAM, if input parameters are invalid.

Send XNvm_EfuseReadIv CDO over IPI request to the PLM. Wait for IPI response from PLM with a default timeout of 300 seconds. If the timeout exceed return error else return the status of the IPI response

memberdef.argsstring: (XNvm_ClientInstance *InstancePtr, const u64 RevokeIdAddr, const XNvm_RevocationId RevokeIdNum)
memberdef.name: XNvm_EfuseReadRevocationId

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to read Revocation ID eFuses requested by the user.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the client instance
Address of the output buffer to store the Revocation ID eFuse data
Revocation ID to be read out

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If the read is successful
XST_INVALID_PARAM - On invalid input parameters
Validate input parameters. Return XST_INVALID_PARAM, if input parameters are invalid.

Send XNvm_EfuseReadRevocationId CDO over IPI request to the PLM. Wait for IPI response from PLM with a default timeout of 300 seconds. If the timeout exceeds return error else return the status of the IPI response.

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to read User eFuses requested by the user.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the client instance
Address of the output buffer to store the User eFuse data

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If the read is successful
XST_INVALID_PARAM - On invalid input parameters
Validate input parameters. Return XST_INVALID_PARAM, if input parameters are invalid.

Send XNvm_EfuseReadUserFuses CDO over IPI request to the PLM. Wait for IPI response from PLM with a default timeout of 300 seconds. If the timeout exceeds return error else return the status of the IPI response.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the client instance
Address of the output buffer to store the MiscCtrlBits eFuses data

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If the read is successful
XST_INVALID_PARAM - On invalid input parameters
Validate input parameters. Return XST_INVALID_PARAM, If input parameters are invalid.

Send EfuseReadMiscCtrlBits CDO over IPI request to the PLM. Wait for IPI response from PLM with a default timeout of 300 seconds. If the timeout exceeds then return error else return the status of the IPI response.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the client instance

Send EfuseReadSecCtrlBits CDO over IPI request to the PLM. Wait for IPI response from PLM with a default timeout of 300 seconds. If the timeout exceeds then return error else return the status of the IPI response.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If the read is successful
XST_INVALID_PARAM - On invalid input parameters
Perform input parameter validation on InstancePtr. Return XST_INVALID_PARAM, if input parameters are invalid.

Send EfuseReadSecMisc1Bits CDO over IPI request to the PLM. Wait for IPI response from PLM with a default timeout of 300 seconds. If the timeout exceeds then return error else return status of the IPI response.

memberdef.name: XNvm_EfuseReadOffchipRevokeId

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to read OffChip ID eFuses requested by the user.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the client instance
Address of the output buffer to store the OffChip ID eFuse data
OffChip ID number to be read out

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If the read is successful
XST_INVALID_PARAM - On invalid input parameters
Validate input parameters. Return XST_INVALID_PARAM, if input parameters are invalid.

Send EfuseReadOffchipRevokeId CDO over IPI request to the PLM. Wait for IPI response from PLM with a default timeout of 300 seconds. If the timeout exceeds then return error else return the status of the IPI response.

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to read PpkHash requested by the user.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the client instance
Address of the output buffer to store the PpkHashAddr eFuses data
Type of the PpkHash to be read out

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If the read is successful
XST_INVALID_PARAM - On invalid input parameters
Validate input parameters. Return XST_INVALID_PARAM, if input parameters are invalid.

Send EfuseReadPpkHash CDO over IPI request to the PLM. Wait for IPI response from PLM with a default timeout of 300 seconds. If the timeout exceeds then return error else return the status of the IPI response.

Send an IPI request to the PLM by using the XNVM_API_ID_EFUSE_READ_CACHE CDO command. Wait for IPI response from PLM with a default timeout of 300 seconds. If the timeout exceeds then error is returned otherwise it returns the status of the IPI response

Send an IPI request to the PLM by using the XNVM_API_ID_EFUSE_READ_CACHE CDO command. Wait for IPI response from PLM with a default timeout of 300 seconds. If the timeout exceeds then error is returned otherwise it returns the status of the IPI response

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to program DME revoke eFuses.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the client instance
DME revoke id to be revoked.
Environmental monitoring flag set by the user. when set to true it will not check for voltage and temperature limits.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If the programming is successful
XST_INVALID_PARAM - On invalid input parameters
Perform input parameter validation on InstancePtr. Return XST_INVALID_PARAM If input parameters are invalid
Send an IPI request to the PLM by using the XNVM_API_ID_EFUSE_WRITE_DME_REVOKE CDO command. Wait for IPI response from PLM with a default timeout of 300 seconds
Fill IPI Payload

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to read Dme Revoke requested by the user.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the client instance
Address of the output buffer to store the Dme Revoke ID eFuses data

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS If the read is successful
ErrorCode If there is a failure
Validate input parameters. Return XST_INVALID_PARAM, if input parameters are invalid.

Send an IPI request to the PLM by using the XNVM_API_ID_EFUSE_READ_CACHE CDO command. Wait for IPI response from PLM with a default timeout of 300 seconds. If the timeout exceeds then error is returned otherwise it returns the status of the IPI response

briefdescription.para: Slr index shift constant.
SLR Index 0.
SLR Index 1.
SLR Index 2.
SLR Index 3.
Word length.
